name: windows-eventlog-mcp
description: Query Windows Event Logs from Claude Desktop using plain English. Diagnose system errors, app crashes, and warnings without touching Event Viewer.

tools.name: get_events_since_boot
tools.description: Get Windows Event Log entries since the last system boot. Supports configurable log allowlist with optional level filtering.

tools.name: get_recent_events
tools.description: Get Windows Event Log entries from the last N minutes. Check Application for app crashes, System for OS/driver issues.

tools.name: get_top_event_sources
tools.description: Get the most frequent event sources in a log over a time window. Identifies noisy or problematic components.

tools.name: get_event_detail
tools.description: Get full detail for a single event by RecordId. Use after browsing to drill into a specific entry.

allowed_logs.title: Allowed Event Logs
allowed_logs.description: Comma-separated list of Windows Event Log names the server is permitted to query. Default: System, Application. Add Security or operational logs only if you understand the privacy implications.
